# brevo_email_template (Data Source)

Look up an email template in Brevo by ID.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) Numeric identifier of the template.

### Read-Only

- `html_content` (String) HTML content of the template.
- `is_active` (Boolean) Whether the template is active.
- `name` (String) Name of the template.
- `reply_to` (String) Email address for replies.
- `sender_email` (String) Email of the sender.
- `sender_name` (String) Name of the sender.
- `subject` (String) Subject of the template.
- `tag` (String) Tag of the template.
